name: Stephen Lynch
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $85,550 for Stephen Lynch in U.S. House, MA-08. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
